application-form-desc: We'll review your vehicle details and license number, then let you know once you're approved to drive.
application-review-desc: Thanks for applying! Our team is reviewing your details and license number. You'll be able to accept rides as soon as you're approved.
application-submitted: Application submitted! We'll review it shortly.
class-hint: Pick the option that best matches your vehicle.
driver-cta-body: Tell us about your vehicle and upload your license for a quick review. We delete your license the moment it’s approved — your documents are never kept on file.
driver-cta-heading: Earn your wings as an RMH driver
error-generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error-generic-retry: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error-license-required: Please enter your driver's license number.
error-missing-locations: Please set both a pickup and a drop-off.
error-missing-schedule-time: Pick a date and time for your scheduled ride.
estimator-subtitle: Drag to estimate any trip across the ride classes.
hero-body: RMH Rideshare connects riders with community drivers. Map your trip with OpenStreetMap, see your route and an upfront estimate, then request a ride.
no-open-requests: No open requests right now. Check back soon!
no-rides-placeholder: No rides yet. Request your first ride!
notes-placeholder: e.g. I'll be by the main entrance
offline-hint: You're offline. Go online to receive new ride requests.
past-trips-placeholder: Your past trips will appear here.
reapply-hint: You can update your details and re-apply below.
ride-accepted: Ride accepted — head to the pickup!
ride-classes-subtitle: A ride for every trip — from everyday to extra-special.
sign-in-description: You need an RMH account to use RMH Rideshare.
sign-in-heading: Sign in to request a ride
sign-in-required: You need an RMH account to apply as a driver.
success-ride-requested: Ride requested! Hang tight while we find a driver.
success-ride-scheduled: Ride scheduled! We'll match a driver near your pickup time.
